headline: Ford Surges 8%, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Stellantis: The Detroit Comeback Has a Clear Leader
summary: Shares of Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) are up 8% in midday trading on Friday, decisively outstripping Detroit peers General Motors (NYSE:GM), up 2%, and Stellantis (NYSE:STLA), up 1%. The Dow Jones Industrial Average is participating in the move, gaining 1%, but Ford stock is doing the heavy lifting in the automotive cohort. The bigger reveal ... Ford Surges 8%, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Stellantis: The Detroit Comeback Has a Clear Leader

headline: Cleveland-Cliffs Awarded 2025 GM Supplier of the Year by General Motors
summary: CLEVELAND, May 22, 2026--Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF) was named 2025 GM Supplier of the Year by General Motors at its 34th annual Supplier of the Year event. Cleveland-Cliffs was the only North American steel producer recognized this year. This is the ninth time the company has received the award.

headline: Nvidia vs. AMD vs. Intel: Which is the best chip stock to own?
summary: Between Nvidia (NVDA), Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), and Intel (INTC), which chip stock stands out among the rest? Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi is joined by Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre, Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré, and Portfolio Wealth Advisors president and CIO Lee Munson to share their thoughts on these leaders within the AI chip space.

headline: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway
summary: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.
